question: According to the chart (as of Apr 01, 2024, partial year), which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year proves that sign-ups is now permanently declining
options.B: The latest year has the lowest sign-ups in the entire period
options.C: The latest year shows a sharp decline compared to previous years
options.D: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified from this partial-year data

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 5 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (892 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,939 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
